attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	ECOOLA.ATO_LINE_ID, ECOOLA.ATTRIBUTE16,
		ECOOLA.ATTRIBUTE4, ECOOLA.CANCELLED_FLAG,
		ECOOLA.CANCELLED_QUANTITY, ECOOLA.CONTEXT,
		ECOOLA.CREATED_BY, ECOOLA.CREATION_DATE,
		ECOOLA.CREATE_DATETIME, ECOOLA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
		ECOOLA.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE, ECOOLA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		ECOOLA.HEADER_ID, ECOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
		ECOOLA.INVOICED_QUANTITY, ECOOLA.ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
		ECOOLA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, ECOOLA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		ECOOLA.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE, ECOOLA.LINE_ID,
		ECOOLA.LINE_NUMBER, ECOOLA.LINE_TYPE_ID,
		ECOOLA.LINK_TO_LINE_ID, ECOOLA.OPEN_FLAG,
		ECOOLA.OPTION_FLAG, ECOOLA.OPTION_NUMBER,
		ECOOLA.ORDERED_QUANTITY, 
		ECOOLA.ORDERED_QUANTITY_UOM,ECOOLA.ORG_ID,
		ECOOLA.PRICING_DATE, ECOOLA.PROMISE_DATE,
		ECOOLA.REQUEST_DATE, ECOOLA.RETURN_CONTEXT,
		ECOOLA.RETURN_REASON_CODE, ECOOLA.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,
		ECOOLA.SERVICE_END_DATE, ECOOLA.SERVICE_REFERENCE_LINE_ID,
		ECOOLA.SERVICE_START_DATE, ECOOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID,
		ECOOLA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID, ECOOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID,
		ECOOLA.SHIPMENT_NUMBER, ECOOLA.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
		ECOOLA.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE, ECOOLA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
		ECOOLA.SPLIT_FROM_LINE_ID, ECOOLA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,
		ECOOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID, ECOOLA.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
		ECOOLA.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE, ECOOLA.EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE,
		ECOOLA.INVOICE_INTERFACE_STATUS_CODE, ECOOLA.SCHEDULE_STATUS_CODE,
		ECOOLA.SERVICE_DURATION ,
		ECOOLA.SHIPPABLE_FLAG,
		ECOOLA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE ,
		ECOOLA.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE,
		ECOOLA.PRICING_QUANTITY,
		ECOOLA.FULFILLED_QUANTITY,
		ECOOLA.CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER,
          ECOOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF,
	     ECOOLA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,
		 ECOOLA.SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DATE,
              ECOOLA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID, /*Added as a part of July7th2019 Plan*/
/* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
		ECOOLA.END_CUSTOMER_ID	,
        ECOOLA.SERVICE_PERIOD		
FROM	
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL ECOOLA
 WHERE 
ECOOLA.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SCOOLA
WHERE ECOOLA.LINE_ID=SCOOLA.LINE_ID)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY ECOOLA.LINE_ID	ORDER BY ECOOLA.CREATE_DATETIME DESC)  =1

SELECT SCOOLA.ATO_LINE_ID, SCOOLA.ATTRIBUTE16,
   SCOOLA.ATTRIBUTE4, SCOOLA.CANCELLED_FLAG,
   SCOOLA.CANCELLED_QUANTITY, SCOOLA.CONTEXT,
   SCOOLA.CREATED_BY, SCOOLA.CREATION_DATE,
   SCOOLA.CREATE_DATETIME, SCOOLA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
   SCOOLA.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE, SCOOLA.GLOBAL_NAME,
   SCOOLA.HEADER_ID, SCOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
   SCOOLA.INVOICED_QUANTITY, SCOOLA.ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
   SCOOLA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SCOOLA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
   SCOOLA.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE, SCOOLA.LINE_ID,
   SCOOLA.LINE_NUMBER, SCOOLA.LINE_TYPE_ID,
   SCOOLA.LINK_TO_LINE_ID, SCOOLA.OPEN_FLAG,
   SCOOLA.OPTION_FLAG, SCOOLA.OPTION_NUMBER,
   SCOOLA.ORDERED_QUANTITY, SCOOLA.ORDERED_QUANTITY_UOM,SCOOLA.ORG_ID,
   SCOOLA.PRICING_DATE, SCOOLA.PROMISE_DATE,
   SCOOLA.REQUEST_DATE, SCOOLA.RETURN_CONTEXT,
   SCOOLA.RETURN_REASON_CODE, SCOOLA.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,
   SCOOLA.SERVICE_END_DATE, SCOOLA.SERVICE_REFERENCE_LINE_ID,
   SCOOLA.SERVICE_START_DATE, SCOOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID,
   SCOOLA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID, SCOOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID,
   SCOOLA.SHIPMENT_NUMBER, SCOOLA.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
   SCOOLA.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE, SCOOLA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
   SCOOLA.SPLIT_FROM_LINE_ID, SCOOLA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,
   SCOOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID, SCOOLA.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
   SCOOLA.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE, SCOOLA.EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE,
   SCOOLA.INVOICE_INTERFACE_STATUS_CODE, SCOOLA.SCHEDULE_STATUS_CODE,
   SCOOLA.SERVICE_DURATION,
   SCOOLA.SHIPPABLE_FLAG,
   'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
   SCOOLA.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE,
   SCOOLA.PRICING_QUANTITY,
   SCOOLA.FULFILLED_QUANTITY,
   SCOOLA.CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER,
           SCOOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF,
       SCOOLA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,
    SCOOLA.SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DATE,
    SCOOLA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE,
                 SCOOLA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID, /*Added as a part of July7th2019 Plan*/
/* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
   SCOOLA.END_CUSTOMER_ID,
   SCOOLA.SERVICE_PERIOD
 FROM 
  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SCOOLA
  WHERE 
 NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
    WHERE SCOOLA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
 OR
 NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    WHERE SCOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
 OR
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )  
 OR
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SO
    WHERE NSSC_SO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE AND SCOOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT 
    AND NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
 OR
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
    WHERE SCOOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )
 OR
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT         
 WHERE  ESOT.SK_ORDER_TYPE_ID=SCOOLA.LINE_TYPE_ID
 AND ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG' )  
 OR
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES MIC
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_CG1_MTL_CATEGORIES MC
 ON MIC.CATEGORY_ID = MC.CATEGORY_ID
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS MCS
 ON MIC.CATEGORY_SET_ID = MCS.CATEGORY_SET_ID
 AND MCS.CATEGORY_SET_NAME = 'PROD GROUP'
 WHERE SCOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = MIC.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 AND MIC.ORGANIZATION_ID = 1)  
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
OR
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
    WHERE SCOOLA.END_CUSTOMER_ID=NCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT )

SELECT 
RANK() OVER 
			(ORDER BY 
				STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT, 
				STLINE_BK.SS_CODE) +  SMLINE_MAX.MAX_LINE_SGK_VAL  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
STLINE_BK.SS_CODE 					SS_CODE,				
STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 		SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
USER 								EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				EDW_CREATE_DTM,
'Y' DV_NRT_BATCH_FLAG,
 -999 AS SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT,
 NULL AS SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,
 'UNK' AS MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
FROM 
(
SELECT 
DISTINCT SCOOLA.LINE_ID 		SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 		SS_CODE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SCOOLA
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
						ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG') )  STLINE_BK,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY),0)  MAX_LINE_SGK_VAL
    FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT WHERE SS_CODE NOT IN ('OPL')) SMLINE_MAX
	WHERE NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT SSOL 
			WHERE SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=	STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
	 	 	AND 	SSOL.SS_CODE=	STLINE_BK.SS_CODE	)	
	AND  NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM  
			(SELECT 
				DISTINCT ECOOLA.LINE_ID 	LINE_ID,
				NSSC_EX.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 	SS_CODE
		 	FROM  
			$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL ECOOLA  
			  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_EX 
						ON(NSSC_EX.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')  
		)EXCEP_BK
	WHERE 	EXCEP_BK.LINE_ID=STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
			AND  EXCEP_BK.SS_CODE= STLINE_BK.SS_CODE)
attributes.Pre SQL:
DELETE FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SCOOLA WHERE SCOOLA.ORG_ID = 3563 AND EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT, $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT 
WHERE SCOOLA.LINE_ID = NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
AND NSOLT.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
AND NSOLT.LINE_STATUS_CD = 'CLOSED' 
AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND NSOLVT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y');
